narrative:
Pease Township has 7,971 registered voters, with 66.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.7 percentage points.
